prompt: Fashion magazine-style snapshot, APS-C. 35mm film photography, faded, low color saturation, film grain, strong direct flash effect, clean and bright skin tones with pronounced shadows, a light-colored wooden cabinet door in the background to make the subject stand out. The person (facial features based on the reference image) faces the camera, wearing a green (#466b5a) sports camisole and green (#466b5a) baseball cap, with long coffee-brown wavy hair, paired with a metallic heart-shaped choker and necklace. Delicate makeup and thick eyelashes, expressing a slightly mischievous and playful pose and expression, holding a plastic water gun to create an urban trendy feel. The composition is centered slightly to the right, with a tight portrait framing that emphasizes the eyes and lip movements. Post-processing uses neutral-to-warm colors with low color saturation; the skin is smooth and grain-free, details are sharp, and the overall atmosphere is youthful street style, relaxed and bold. The word VINTAGE is written at the top of the image in a white serif font.
promptEn: Fashion magazine-style snapshot, APS-C. 35mm film photography, faded, low color saturation, film grain, strong direct flash effect, clean and bright skin tones with pronounced shadows, a light-colored wooden cabinet door in the background to make the subject stand out. The person (facial features based on the reference image) faces the camera, wearing a green (#466b5a) sports camisole and green (#466b5a) baseball cap, with long coffee-brown wavy hair, paired with a metallic heart-shaped choker and necklace. Delicate makeup and thick eyelashes, expressing a slightly mischievous and playful pose and expression, holding a plastic water gun to create an urban trendy feel. The composition is centered slightly to the right, with a tight portrait framing that emphasizes the eyes and lip movements. Post-processing uses neutral-to-warm colors with low color saturation; the skin is smooth and grain-free, details are sharp, and the overall atmosphere is youthful street style, relaxed and bold. The word VINTAGE is written at the top of the image in a white serif font.
promptZh: 时尚杂志风格快照，APS-C 画幅。35mm 胶片摄影，褪色感，低色彩饱和度，胶片颗粒感，强烈的直闪光效果，干净明亮的肤色与明显的阴影，背景为浅色木质柜门，凸显主体。人物（面部特征基于参考图）面向镜头，身穿 绿色 (#466b5a) 运动吊带背心，头戴 绿色 (#466b5a) 棒球帽，留着 咖啡棕色 长波浪卷发，搭配金属心形颈圈和项链。精致的妆容和浓密的睫毛，呈现出略带俏皮和顽皮的姿势与表情，手持塑料水枪，营造出都市潮流感。构图略微偏右，紧凑的肖像构图强调了眼睛和唇部动态。后期处理采用中性偏暖色调，色彩饱和度低；皮肤光滑无颗粒，细节锐利，整体氛围呈现年轻街头风格，轻松且大胆。图片顶部用白色衬线字体写有 VINTAGE 字样。
